name: kaiblog
description: KaiBlog - 博客 + 外部播客聚合 · DDD 三层架构

scripts.dev: echo 'S0 scaffold — implement in S1' && exit 0
scripts.build: echo 'S0 scaffold — implement in S1' && exit 0
scripts.preview: echo 'S0 scaffold — implement in S1' && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo 'S0 scaffold — real eslint arrives in S1' && exit 0
scripts.typecheck: echo 'S0 scaffold — real tsc arrives in S1' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'S0 scaffold — real vitest arrives in S1' && exit 0
scripts.format: echo 'S0 scaffold — real prettier arrives in S1' && exit 0

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: echo 'pre-commit: lint+typecheck will be wired in S1'
simple-git-hooks.commit-msg: echo 'commit-msg: commitlint will be wired in S1 (npx --no -- commitlint --edit $1)'
